title: ZESCO Tariff Application Submitted to ERB
message: ZESCO Limited has formally submitted its cost-reflective tariff application to the Energy Regulation Board (ERB). The application seeks a 35% tariff increase to close the revenue deficit of ZMW 780 million per annum. ERB public hearings scheduled for May 2025.

title: Zambia Railways Q1 2025 Milestone Review Due
message: The first quarterly milestone review for the GRZ capital injection to Zambia Railways is due in April 2025. IDC Portfolio Monitoring Team to assess service reliability, revenue recovery, and governance improvement milestones before recommending release of the second tranche of ZMW 200 million.

title: ZCCM-IH FY2024 Audit Pending — Emphasis of Matter Expected
message: Ernst & Young Zambia has indicated that the FY2024 audit opinion for ZCCM-IH will likely include an emphasis of matter paragraph on mine rehabilitation fund adequacy. The fund shortfall is estimated at ZMW 570 million. IDC to engage ZCCM-IH board on top-up plan.

title: ZANACO NPL Ratio Exceeds BoZ Threshold
message: ZANACO's non-performing loan ratio has risen to 11.2%, exceeding the Bank of Zambia regulatory threshold of 10%. BoZ has issued a supervisory letter requiring a credible NPL reduction plan within 60 days. IDC as 45% shareholder is monitoring closely.

title: IDC FY2024 Annual Results Approved
message: The IDC Board of Directors has approved the FY2024 annual financial results. Consolidated revenue of ZMW 8.8 billion and net profit of ZMW 1.1 billion. Interim dividend of ZMW 220 million declared. Results to be submitted to Ministry of Finance by 10 April 2025.

title: Kafue Gorge Lower — Commissioning Target Q2 2025
message: The Kafue Gorge Lower hydropower project is 92% complete. ZESCO has confirmed the commissioning target of Q2 2025 for the first 150 MW unit. Full 750 MW capacity expected by end of 2025. This will significantly reduce load shedding and improve ZESCO's financial position.

title: Zambia Gold ASM Procurement Below Target
message: Zambia Gold Company's FY2024 artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) gold procurement increased by 18% against the 20% target set in IDC-DIR-2024-009. Management has attributed the shortfall to smuggling on the North-Western Province border. Corrective action plan required.
